parameters.jsCode:
return [
  // Recent releases - last 15 days
  { category: 'Recent AAA Release', query: '"game" "released" OR "launched" OR "now available" 2025 publisher developer' },
  { category: 'Recent DLC Released', query: '"DLC" OR "expansion pack" OR "expansion" "released" OR "available now" 2025 game' },
  { category: 'Recent Mobile Launch', query: '"mobile game" OR "iOS" OR "Android" "launched" OR "released" 2025 "global launch"' },
  { category: 'Recent MMORPG Update', query: '"MMORPG" OR "MMO" "expansion" OR "major update" OR "patch" "released" 2025' },
  { category: 'Recent Steam Release', query: 'steam "new release" OR "early access" game 2025 developer publisher' },
  { category: 'Recent Console Launch', query: 'PS5 OR Xbox "exclusive" OR "launch" game "released" OR "available" 2025' },

  // Upcoming - next 90 days
  { category: 'Upcoming April 2025', query: 'video game "April 2025" release date announced' },
  { category: 'Upcoming May 2025', query: 'video game "May 2025" release date announced' },
  { category: 'Upcoming June 2025', query: 'video game "June 2025" release date announced' },
  { category: 'Upcoming Q2 2025', query: 'video game "Q2 2025" release date confirmed' },
  { category: 'Upcoming DLC 2025', query: 'game DLC OR expansion "release date" OR "coming" 2025 announced' },
  { category: 'Upcoming Mobile 2025', query: 'mobile game "launch date" OR "release date" 2025 global' },
  { category: 'Upcoming MMORPG 2025', query: 'MMORPG OR MMO expansion OR update "2025" release confirmed' },
  { category: 'Upcoming Live Service', query: 'live service game season OR update OR patch 2025 date' },
  { category: 'Upcoming Esports Launch', query: 'competitive game OR esports title launch 2025 publisher' },

  // High value publishers
  { category: 'Tencent Release', query: 'Tencent Games game launch OR release OR update 2025' },
  { category: 'NetEase Release', query: 'NetEase Games game launch OR release OR update 2025' },
  { category: 'NCSoft Release', query: 'NCSoft game launch OR release OR update 2025' },
  { category: 'Nexon Release', query: 'Nexon game launch OR release OR update 2025' },
  { category: 'Krafton Release', query: 'Krafton PUBG game launch OR release 2025' },
  { category: 'Perfect World Release', query: 'Perfect World Entertainment game launch 2025' },
  { category: 'Bandai Namco Release', query: 'Bandai Namco game release OR launch 2025' },
  { category: 'Square Enix Release', query: 'Square Enix game release OR launch OR DLC 2025' },
  { category: 'Capcom Release', query: 'Capcom game release OR launch OR DLC 2025' },
  { category: 'SEGA Release', query: 'SEGA game release OR launch 2025' },

  // Gaming news sources - English only
  { category: 'IGN Announcement', query: 'site:ign.com game release date 2025' },
  { category: 'Kotaku Announcement', query: 'site:kotaku.com game release launch 2025' },
  { category: 'GameSpot Announcement', query: 'site:gamespot.com game release date 2025' },
  { category: 'PC Gamer Announcement', query: 'site:pcgamer.com game release launch 2025' },
  { category: 'Eurogamer Announcement', query: 'site:eurogamer.net game release launch 2025' },
  { category: 'VGC Announcement', query: 'site:videogameschronicle.com game release 2025' },
  { category: 'GamesRadar Announcement', query: 'site:gamesradar.com game release date 2025' },
  { category: 'TheGamer Announcement', query: 'site:thegamer.com game release launch 2025' }
];
